title: Birthday Celebration
name: Armaan Pandher
message: Thank you all for the wonderful birthday wishes! Your support means the world to me. Here's to another amazing year at Appodeal!

title: Birthday Celebration
name: Anna Kolyada
message: Grateful for all the birthday love from the team! Looking forward to what this new year brings.

title: Innovation Mindset
headline: Building Tools at Lightning Speed
description: Non-engineering teams are creating useful tools incredibly quickly, showing we're learning fast and moving in the right direction. This innovation mindset across all departments is driving our rapid growth.
takeaway: When everyone becomes a builder, magic happens

title: Security & Best Practices
description: As we scale rapidly, we're implementing proper engineering and security practices. All teams should migrate to managed deployments for better security and reliability.

title: Family First
headline: Supporting Our Team During Difficult Times
quote: Taking time off for a family emergency — the team has my back
author: Pavel Golubev

title: Performance Review Season
description: Keeping it light and focused this quarter! Managers answer 3 key questions, everyone completes self-assessments covering performance, culture, and psychological safety.

title: Team Recognition
reason: Outstanding technical leadership and problem-solving skills that drive our platform forward

title: Cross-Team Excellence
reason: Exceptional collaboration and technical expertise driving key platform improvements

title: Leadership Recognition
reason: Exceptional leadership and strategic vision that guides our teams to success

title: Outstanding Performance
reason: Consistently delivering exceptional results and inspiring the team with dedication

title: Gaming Success Story
headline: Solitaire Achieves Major Retention Breakthrough
description: Our Solitaire game is making significant strides with bug fixes resolved, new level-up features boosting engagement, and quest data showing 8% improvement in early retention metrics.

title: Campaign Optimization Win
headline: Smart Config Changes Drive Major Results
description: Warmaker campaign adjustments improved session length and progression dramatically. The configuration flexibility is proving to be a game-changer for user engagement.

title: AI Innovation Progress
headline: Automated Data Analysis Takes Shape
description: Our AI-powered data analysis system is being tested across 56 machines, designed to minimize manual work and errors. The AI agent is already generating and testing code, discovering bugs that affect 20% of our data.

title: SDK Platform Progress
headline: SDK Development on Track for April
description: SDK version 4.1.0 is planned for April with only 9 work items remaining. Cross-platform solutions are being successfully tested on both iOS and Android.
takeaway: Solid progress toward our next major SDK milestone

title: Revenue Growth Engine
headline: Strong Financial Foundation
description: We've achieved approximately $100M in gross profit with $20M EBITDA, positioning us for 40% year-over-year growth as we build toward our ambitious vision.
takeaway: Solid fundamentals fuel our expansion plans

title: AI-Powered Efficiency
headline: OKR Auditor Transforms Goal Tracking
description: Our AI OKR Auditor now checks over 1,000 individual OKRs daily, bringing unprecedented visibility and accountability to our goal-setting process across all teams.

title: Security Victory
headline: Dynamic SDK Signatures Crush Fraud
description: Our advanced fraud detection system using dynamic SDK signatures has dramatically reduced fraud from 22% to under 4%, protecting our platform and partners.
takeaway: Smart security innovations deliver massive results

title: Learning Culture Thrives
headline: Book Club Reaches 140+ Members
description: Our 'Passionate Curiosity' book club continues to grow, now with over 140 participants fostering a culture of continuous learning and intellectual curiosity across the company.

title: Wellness Initiative
headline: Daily Yoga Builds Team Wellness
quote: Join us every day at 13:10 CET for yoga — streaming online and in the office for everyone's wellbeing
author: Anna Kolyada

title: Monday Motivation
headline: Build. Ship. Improve.
prompt2: How will you turn ideas into pull requests?
coreValue: Innovation mindset drives everything we do
